hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in "$HOME"/.config/*|"$HOME"/.claude/*) echo "Do not edit Home Manager managed paths directly. Edit the corresponding file in the repository's .config/ directory instead." >&2; exit 2;; esac

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); EXT="${FILE##*.}"; case "$EXT" in nix) alejandra -q "$FILE" ;; lua) stylua "$FILE" ;; js|ts|json|jsonc) biome check --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; yaml|yml) yamlfmt "$FILE" ;; esac; exit 0
